title: Simple Elevators
description: Simple elevators on daylight sensors, for your server.
body:
**Simple elevators for your server!**

- To create an elevator, you need to put one daylight sensor exactly above the other.
- To use the elevator, you need to stand on any of the light sensors and press the shift button while on it.

_In the configuration, you can configure the search radius of the second daylight sensor, the sound of teleportation and particles._
